pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in task description and queried via kubectl in setup_task.sh and nginx-deployment.yaml.
Explicitly defined in task description, injected via namespaces.yaml, and queried via kubectl in setup_task.sh.
Explicitly requested in task description ('scale ... from 2 replicas to 4 replicas').
Explicitly set in nginx-deployment.yaml and enforced via setup_task.sh ('kubectl scale deployment/nginx-web -n staging --replicas=2').

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed the task operates on a synthetically deployed Kubernetes cluster managed by Rancher. The target deployment ('nginx-web'), namespace ('staging'), initial replica count (2), and the expected final replica count (4) explicitly match the task description instructions, Kubernetes manifests (namespaces.yaml, nginx-deployment.yaml), and setup script logic.
